summary: Martin Fowler shares news about the second edition of the Dominion board game, which updates the base game and Intrigue expansion with replacement cards. He recommends new buyers get the second edition and existing owners purchase the $12 update packs while they're still available. The post provides practical purchasing advice and links to Amazon for the various editions and update packs.
key_points: Second edition replaces half-a-dozen cards in both the base game and Intrigue expansion
Update packs ($12 each) are available for existing owners but only for a limited time
New Intrigue is packaged as expansion-only without base cards
The second edition is considered an improvement based on Fowler's limited play
money_quotes: It's simple to learn, but has great variety and subtlety.
From my limited play the second edition is certainly an improvement, so get that.
The update packs will only be around for a while, until they feel most folks have upgraded, so I'd suggest grabbing them soon.
key_insight: If you own or are buying Dominion, be aware of the second edition upgrade and grab the update packs while they're still available.
